candidates.why: Exact match for total current assets on the balance sheet.
Not current assets; included only because it appeared in candidate list.

candidates.row_label: Non-current securities held as non-current assets
candidates.why: Specific non-current asset, not total current assets.
Specific non-current asset, not total current assets.
Cash flow line, unrelated to current assets.
Exact balance-sheet cash line for cash and cash equivalents.

candidates.row_label: Cash and cash equivalents at end of period
candidates.why: Cash flow ending cash can reconcile, but CHE should come from balance sheet when available.

candidates.row_label: Cash and cash equivalents at start of period
candidates.why: Beginning cash, not preferred for CHE.

candidates.row_label: Exchange rate differences in cash and cash equivalents
candidates.why: FX effect on cash, not the cash balance.
Exact match for total current liabilities.
Component only, not total current liabilities.
Cash flow change item, not balance-sheet stock.
Non-current liabilities, not total current liabilities.
Non-current liabilities, not current liabilities.

candidates.row_label: Long Term Debt Maturing within 1 Year
candidates.why: Explicit current portion of long-term debt; ideal match for short-term debt/current maturities.
Short-term financing liability and non-lease. Could be part of STD when present separately.
Same concept as overdraft facility; alternate label across periods.

final_choice.row_label: Long Term Debt Maturing within 1 Year

variables.notes: Selected minimal non-lease current debt components. Excluded 'Financial Leasing' and lease-maturity rows per baseline. Did not use total 'Liabilities to credit institutions' to avoid possible double counting with current maturities/non-current debt.

candidates.why: Exact match for taxes payable/current tax liabilities.
Exact total PPE line; preferred net/total PPE measure on balance sheet.
Only a component and gross lease-related amount, not preferred total PPE.

candidates.row_label: Right of Use Tangible Assets - Capital/Finance Lease - Gross
candidates.why: Lease/ROU gross amount, not preferred baseline total PPE.

candidates.row_label: Acc Depreciation PPE under Capital Lease
candidates.why: Contra-asset, not PPE total.

candidates.row_label: Right of Use Tangible Assets - Capital/Finance Lease - Accumulated Depreciation
candidates.why: Contra-asset, not PPE total.

candidates.row_label: Acquisition of property plant and equipment
candidates.why: Capex flow, not balance-sheet PPE stock.

Intangibles, not PPE.
Intangible capex flow, not PPE stock.

variables.notes: Used reported total PPE line; preferred over components and lease-specific rows.

candidates.why: Exact match for total assets.
Exact net cash flow from operating activities; preferred OANCF line.

candidates.row_label: Cash flow from operating activities before changes in operating capital and tax paid
candidates.why: Operating cash flow subtotal before working-capital changes and taxes, not the final OANCF.

candidates.row_label: Cash flow from operating activities before change in working capital
candidates.why: Operating cash flow subtotal before working-capital changes, not the final OANCF.

variables.notes: Selected final net operating cash flow line rather than pre-working-capital subtotals.
